blended.narrative: Crabbe Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 4,894 ft. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.2" of snow, highs of 50°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 6" of snow, highs of 47°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
